description.div: The Commonwealth is a voluntary association of 56 independent and equal countries. It is home to 2.5 billion people, and includes both advanced economies and developing countries. 33 of our members are small states, including many island nations.

names.name: The Hong Kong Council of the Church of Christ in China
The United Church in Jamaica and the Cayman Islands

La Convention relative aux zones humides d\'importance internationale particulièrement comme habitats de la sauvagine
Convention de Ramsar
Convention sur les zones humides

description.div: Convention on Wetlands of International Importance especially as Waterfowl Habitat

description.div: The Latin Church is the largest autonomous church within the Catholic Church.

der Bau von Kirchen mit der Absis in Richtung Osten

Gräber werden so errichtet, dass sie nach Osten zeigen

description.div: Given the geographical uncertainty of the borders of the Asian continent, this unit serves mainly as a rough classification of sites in European, Asian or other continents. No geographic claims are implied here.

names.name: Congregational Christian Church in American Samoa

description.div: The European Union is an economic, political, military and financial union of European states. Sites in the following countries have been documented so far::

Given the geographical uncertainty of the borders of the European continent, this unit serves mainly as a rough classification of sites in European, Asian or other continents. No geographic claims are implied here.
